segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَا رَأَيْتُ مِنْ ضَعِيفَاتِ الدِّينِ وَ نَاقِصَاتِ الْعُقُولِ أَسْلَبَ لِذِي لُبٍّ مِنْكُنَّ .
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَا رَأَيْتُ مِنْ ضَعِيفَاتِ الدِّينِ وَ نَاقِصَاتِ الْعُقُولِ أَسْلَبَ لِذِي لُبٍّ مِنْكُنَّ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Suleyman Bin Ja’far Al Ja’fary, from the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘I<sup>saww</sup> have not seen from the weak ones of the Religion, and the deficient of the intellects, ones with a stiff heart more than you (women)’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Suleyman Bin Ja’far Al Ja’fary, from the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘I<sup>saww</sup> have not seen from the weak ones of the Religion, and the deficient of the intellects, ones with a stiff heart more than you (women)’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from Sulayman ibn Ja’far al-Ja’fariy from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘I never saw anyone more snatching from an intelligent person, than these weak in religion, deficient of reason; you women are.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from Sulayman ibn Ja’far al-Ja’fariy from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘I never saw anyone more snatching from an intelligent person, than these weak in religion, deficient of reason; you women are.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/7)
gradings.label: مرسل
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/7)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ الْجَعْفَرِيِّ عَمَّنْ ذَكَرَهُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

parts.text: سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ الْجَعْفَرِيِّ عَمَّنْ ذَكَرَهُ

segments: أَتَيْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَخَرَجَ إِلَيَّ ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا عُقْبَةُ شَغَلَتْنَا عَنْكَ هَؤُلَاءِ النِّسَاءُ .
arabic.text: أَتَيْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَخَرَجَ إِلَيَّ ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا عُقْبَةُ شَغَلَتْنَا عَنْكَ هَؤُلَاءِ النِّسَاءُ .

segments: Ahmad Bin Al Hajjal, from Ghalib Bin Usman, from Uqba Bin Khalid who said,
‘I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and he<sup>asws</sup> came out to me, then said: ‘O Uqba! These women (try to) hold us<sup>asws</sup> back from meeting you’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ahmad Bin Al Hajjal, from Ghalib Bin Usman, from Uqba Bin Khalid who said,

‘I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and he<sup>asws</sup> came out to me, then said: ‘O Uqba! These women (try to) hold us<sup>asws</sup> back from meeting you’.

segments: 2. Ahmad ibn al-Hajjal has narrated from Ghalib ibn ‘Uthman from “Uqbah ibn Khalid who has said the following: “I once went to see abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and he (the Imam) came to me saying, ‘O ‘Uqbah, the women held us back from meeting you.”’
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ahmad ibn al-Hajjal has narrated from Ghalib ibn ‘Uthman from “Uqbah ibn Khalid who has said the following: “I once went to see abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and he (the Imam) came to me saying, ‘O ‘Uqbah, the women held us back from meeting you.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/7)
gradings.label: حسن أو موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/7)

narratorChain.raw: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ الْحَجَّالِ عَنْ غَالِبِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عُقْبَةَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ قَالَ
